contracts.shape: Freelancer identity record (E1) delivered from Identity & Auth to the Data Store via an asynchronous message-broker event; the OAuth callback publishes the identity-write event onto a queue and does not block on persistence.
failure_modes: store-unavailable — PostgreSQL instance unreachable; OAuth callback cannot persist the identity record, login fails
constraint-violation — uniqueness constraint on provider identity (e.g. duplicate provider_id insert on concurrent callbacks); write fails
partial-failure — write begins but connection drops before commit; ACID transaction rolls back, no partial record persisted

contracts.shape: Client Project and related entity records (E2 — Client Project, E5 — Currency designation, E6 — Client record, E7 — Billable Rate) — persisted and retrieved by Project Management to/from the Data Store. Access covers create, read (list + detail), update, and delete of project-level records. Field-level schemas for E2/E5/E6/E7 deferred to S4 per cut deferred[].
failure_modes: store-unavailable — PostgreSQL instance unreachable; project create/read/update/delete operations fail
constraint-violation — FK integrity failure (e.g. orphaned project referencing deleted freelancer) or uniqueness violation on project name within owner scope
not-found — queried project record does not exist in the store (deleted or wrong owner scope)

contracts.shape: Authenticated freelancer session — Project Management calls Identity & Auth in-process to resolve the current session and obtain the freelancer identity (E1 reference) used to scope all project data reads and writes to the owning freelancer. No field-level session token design invented here; shape is the session presence signal and owner identity reference.
failure_modes: no-valid-session — session absent or expired; Identity & Auth returns no authenticated identity; Project Management must reject the request (unauthorized)
callee-error — Identity & Auth raises an exception during session resolution (e.g. store lookup failure for identity record); Project Management cannot determine ownership and must fail the request

contracts.shape: Time Entry records (E3) — persisted and retrieved by Time Logging to/from the Data Store. Access covers create (new entry) and read (list entries per project). Association with project and freelancer is expressed via foreign-key references in E3. Field-level layout (date, description, hours columns) deferred to S2 per cut deferred[].
failure_modes: store-unavailable — PostgreSQL instance unreachable; time entry cannot be persisted or retrieved
constraint-violation — FK constraint failure (e.g. referenced project does not exist or is deleted concurrently); write rejected
not-found — entry set queried for a project returns empty or the project association is missing

contracts.shape: Client Project record reference (E2) including project-level Currency (E5) and Billable Rate (E7) — Time Logging calls Project Management in-process to validate the target project exists and is owned by the authenticated freelancer, and to inherit the project's currency and rate for the time entry association. Field-level project schema deferred to S4.
failure_modes: not-found — referenced project does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated freelancer; Time Logging must reject the entry
callee-error — Project Management raises an exception during project lookup (e.g. transient store error); Time Logging cannot validate the association and must fail

contracts.shape: Time Entry records (E3) queried by Invoice Export from the Data Store — filtered by project reference and calendar month. Access is read-only (aggregate query for line-item generation). Field-level time-entry layout deferred to S2; aggregation query design deferred to S3 per cut deferred[].
failure_modes: store-unavailable — PostgreSQL instance unreachable; invoice aggregation query cannot execute; export fails
not-found — no time entries exist for the given project and calendar month; zero-line-item result (edge case the export flow must handle)
partial-failure — query returns a partial result set due to a cursor or connection error mid-read; incomplete invoice line items

contracts.shape: Client Project header data — Invoice Export calls Project Management in-process to read the project's Currency designation (E5), Billable Rate (E7), and Client record (E6) required to populate invoice line-item computations and invoice header. Field-level schemas for E5/E6/E7 deferred to S4.
failure_modes: not-found — referenced project does not exist or is not accessible; invoice export cannot proceed without rate and currency
callee-error — Project Management raises an exception during project data retrieval; Invoice Export cannot compute monetary totals and must fail the request

contracts.shape: Session presence signal — Web Ingress calls Identity & Auth in-process on each authenticated route to verify a valid session exists before dispatching to a domain component. Result is authenticated (session valid, freelancer identity available) or unauthenticated (redirect to login). No session token format designed here.
failure_modes: no-valid-session — no session cookie present or session is expired; Web Ingress must redirect to the OAuth login entry point rather than dispatching to the domain component
callee-error — Identity & Auth raises an exception during session check (e.g. store lookup failure); Web Ingress must treat the request as unauthenticated and redirect

contracts.shape: Project management page request dispatch — Web Ingress routes an authenticated HTTP request in-process to Project Management, which returns a server-rendered HTML response (project list, project detail, project create/edit/delete forms). No wire format or URL path schema invented here; shape is the request/response dispatch at the MPA routing seam.
failure_modes: callee-error — Project Management raises an unhandled exception during request processing; Web Ingress must return an appropriate HTTP error response
not-found — requested project resource does not exist (e.g. detail view for a deleted project); Project Management returns a not-found result; Web Ingress renders a 404 page

contracts.shape: Time-logging page request dispatch — Web Ingress routes an authenticated HTTP request in-process to Time Logging, which returns a server-rendered HTML response (time entry form, time entry list per project). No wire format or URL path schema invented here; shape is the request/response dispatch at the MPA routing seam.
failure_modes: callee-error — Time Logging raises an unhandled exception during request processing; Web Ingress must return an appropriate HTTP error response
not-found — requested project context for time logging does not exist; Time Logging returns a not-found result; Web Ingress renders a 404 page

contracts.shape: Invoice export request dispatch — Web Ingress routes an authenticated HTTP request in-process to Invoice Export, which streams a PDF binary response to the browser as a file download (content-type application/pdf). The PDF streaming response crosses this seam; no wire format or URL path schema invented here. PDF generation library deferred to S3 per cut deferred[].
failure_modes: callee-error — Invoice Export raises an unhandled exception during PDF generation or aggregation; Web Ingress must return an appropriate HTTP error response instead of a partial or broken PDF
not-found — the specified project or calendar month yields no accessible data; Invoice Export cannot produce a valid invoice; Web Ingress renders an error response
